name: peepdf
description: Powerful Python tool to analyze PDF documents. Tool: https://github.com/jesparza/peepdf. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #536 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map peepdf output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
